name: Gingered Carrot & Spinach Supreme (Shaahi Pal)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups frozen spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add scallions, garlic, and turmeric. Sauté until the scallions are soft, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Stir in grated carrots, celery, vegetable stock, grated ginger root, coriander powder, and grated coconut.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then add the thawed and drained frozen spinach.
5. Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve hot.
